Beginning of game: Let me know when you have made it inside the building.
I'm in.

After first death
The employees here are hostile. I can confirm they are using arcane power.
Nothing we haven't dealt with before. We have enough power stored from the last arcane being we killed to bring you back when you die.
Being Texted by agent frei
I just got a text from Agent Frei's phone.

I'm not sure. He seemed to be extremely disoriented. I couldn't get any straight answers out of him.
After finding Agent Frei's phone
I found Agent Frei. His soul has been trapped in his phone.

I don't know exactly. It seems to have broken his mind. I couldn't get clear details from him.
I think the whistleblower killed him and somehow interfered with the resurrection crystals. I also think she's lying about a lot of stuff. I haven't found any evidence to support her accusations.
Hmm...

After defeating head of It
Update: I've finished investigating the IT department. No evidence of anything illegal here.

After finding 2nd floor evidence
